examples: He walked through—and vanished. Poof! Like that.
They approach, embrace, and poof! they disappear in a blinding flash of light.
However, if one tells a lie... Poof.
Finally at the end of the path, a gaze towards the last house on the left, and Poof!
And then poof, there was Mr. Murray slogging through a confounding second-round upset on a cool evening full of squandered chances.
